docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BBC INVESTMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BULLOCK, GLENN DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF ATTORNEY UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY CCP 415.45 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BBC INVESTMENT COMPANY
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS GRANTED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BULLOCK, GLENN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BULLOCK, GLENN
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BBC INVESTMENT COMPANY COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-23-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER BELDON YEE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON SEP-23-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 611, DIANE ELAN WICK.

JUDGE DIANE WICK, CLERK-BETH WILBER, REPORTER-BRENDA FIELDS: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL, PARTIES ARE PRESENT. MR. ROSSOFF PRESENTS PLAINTIFF'S CASE THEN DEFT. IN PRO PER, GLENN BULLOCK TESTIFIES IN THE NARRATIVE FOR THE DEFENSE, BOTH PARTIES PRESENT BRIEF CLOSING ARGUMENTS; CASE IS SUBMITTED AND COURT RULES FOR THE PLAINTIFF; MR. ROSSOFF PROVIDES THE COURT WITH A JUDGMENT FORM.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BBC INVESTMENT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BULLOCK, GLENN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 766 KANSAS STREET, #3, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107 $1,944.60 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,944.60, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY DECLARATION FOR THE PER-DIEM DAMAGES; AS TO DEFENDANT BULLOCK, GLENN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BULLOCK, GLENN
